displayNameZh: Pencil 工具 Logo 动画介绍
summary: Yt Pencil Intro component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「Pencil 工具 Logo 动画介绍」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-pencil-intro/src/YtPencilIntro.tsx` and `remotion/yt-pencil-intro/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtPencilIntro` and `ytPencilIntroDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Pencil Intro Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-pencil-intro to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtPencilIntroProps API and register the YtPencilIntro composition with the default props.
